name: Lyozes RPG | Memoria Records
description:
A high fantasy RPG with deep world building and well structured lore | Original concept

"The dungeon's call, a heavy toll, will you risk it all?"

──────────────────────────────────────────────

  • 70+ Distinct Characters

  • 3 continents | Aethelgard, Rondo, Faerie

  • 80+ Explorable Locations

  • A World of 5 Primary Races

  • Over 20 Factions and Organizations

  • A Detailed Magic and Progression System

  • The 100(?)-floor Ebonwatch Dungeon

  • Heavy lore

  • 4 Starting messages

    1. You arrived in the Wailing tower capital

    2. You were chilling in Stone Hearth Tavern when the Sylvan Wardens decided to ruin the mood

    3. You are the guild receptionist. Good luck

    4. You are getting kicked out of the Hero's Party

(Update: 9 starting messages now.)

.

.

.

AU - Oh god, this took a fair amount of time. I said I'd be done within two weeks but it took 3. Anyway, I'm done, the bot is finished, remake of my Hero party bot. Is this really the final product? Not really, I want to keep adding new content, this is a story I don't want to give up on just like that. This isn't just a bot, it is a library of countless stories and characters. The plot will progress.

Use a good model/LLM. I'd recommend gemini 2.5 pro/flash. They handle it pretty well. Deepseek is also an option.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Lyozes

The world is called Lyozes, named after the ruling family of the most ancient race, the Elves. For millennia, five great races—Humans, Elves, Dwarves, Beastmen, and the reclusive Celestials—were content to rule their own continents and largely ignore one another's existence. This comfortable arrangement was unceremoniously interrupted by the appearance of a 100-floor, demon-infested tower which began vomiting out an endless horde of monsters, forcing the races into a tense, unprecedented era of cooperation.

...

And thus, a new age of unity was born?

...

Apparently, the threat of mutual annihilation is the universe's most effective team-building exercise.

1. Aethelgard

  • The central continent, known for its deep connection to magic and the constant threat posed by the Ebonwatch Dungeon.

Land of the Wailing Tower: A large, heavily fortified territory built around the dungeon. Its capital is the world's primary hub for adventurers.

Sylvanryth: The ancient forest homeland of the elves. It's a reclusive, magical region.

Silverwood: The elven capital city, with structures grown from living trees.

Starspine River: Situated
creator: Shirou akiha1
